zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Davenport Esq於1403年出生在英國爾亨波瑞時，他的父親Hugh Davenport28歲，母親Margaret Bostock23歲。他於大約1424年與Margery de Leigh在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1397年住在英國英格蘭爾海爾。他去世於1443年在英國英格蘭爾亨波瑞享年40歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Davenport Esq于1403年出生在英国爾亨波瑞时，他的父亲Hugh Davenport28岁，母亲Margaret Bostock23岁。他于大约1424年与Margery de Leigh在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1397年住在英国英格兰爾海爾。他去世于1443年在英国英格兰爾亨波瑞享年40岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Davenport Esq was born in 1403, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh Davenport, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Bostock, was 23. He married Margery de Leigh about 1424, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Hale, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1397. He died in 1443, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Davenport Esq est né en 1403, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Davenport, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bostock, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Leigh environ 1424, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Hale, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1397. Il est décédé en 1443, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Davenport Esq 1403 in Henbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Davenport 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Bostock 23. Er hat um 1424 in England Margery de Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1397 hat er in Hale, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1443 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Davenport Esq è nato il nel 1403 nel Henbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Davenport, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bostock, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margery de Leigh circa 1424, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Hale, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1397. Morì nel 1443, nel Henbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport Esqが1403年にイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで生まれた時，父Hugh Davenportは28歳，母Margaret Bostockは23歳であった。約1424年にイギリスでMargery de Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘイルに住んでいた。彼は1443年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで40歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport Esq(이)가 1403년 영국 체실르 헨버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Davenport(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bostock(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1424년 영국에서 Margery de Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1397년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헤일에서 살았다. 그는 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨버이에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Davenport Esq nasceu em 1403, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Davenport, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bostock, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Leigh aproximadamente 1424, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Hale, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1397. Ele faleceu em 1443, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Davenport Esq родился в 1403 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Davenport было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bostock, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Leigh около 1424 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности хэл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1397 году. Он умер в 1443 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Davenport Esq nació en 1403, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Davenport, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Bostock, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margery de Leigh aproximadamente 1424, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Hale, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1397. Murió en 1443, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
